00-000-4c4e0acd.sentence: Intervention: 40 infusions of a 500-mL chelation solution (3 g of disodium EDTA, 7 g of ascorbate, B vitamins, electrolytes, procaine, and heparin) [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:200-1000].

00-002-4c12a16c.sentence: Study design: Double-blind, placebo-controlled, 2 × 2 factorial randomized trial [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:0-800].

00-006-944bd889.sentence: Effect estimate with uncertainty: systolic BP by 2.00 mm Hg (95% confidence interval, 0.43–3.58) and diastolic BP by 1.78 mm Hg (95% confidence interval, 0.73–2.82) [#ev:magnesium_supplementation_meta:100-900].

00-007-18c780c5.sentence: Heterogeneity: residual heterogeneity may still exist [#ev:magnesium_supplementation_meta:700-1500].

00-008-094631ab.sentence: The study enrolled 1708 patients aged 50 years or older who had experienced a myocardial infarction at least 6 weeks prior and had serum creatinine levels of 2.0 mg/dL or less [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:0-800].

00-009-5c80d74b.sentence: The intervention consisted of 40 infusions of a 500-mL chelation solution [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:100-900].

00-010-1cf9025a.sentence: A total of 40 infusions were administered [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:300-1100].

00-011-147dd601.sentence: This solution contained 3 g of disodium EDTA and 7 g of ascorbate [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:200-1000].

00-012-18386f2c.sentence: B vitamins, electrolytes, procaine, and heparin were additional components [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:200-1000].

00-013-508f6f4b.sentence: The primary endpoint was a composite of total mortality, recurrent myocardial infarction, stroke, coronary revascularization, or hospitalization for angina [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:700-1500].

00-014-648be208.sentence: Total mortality was one component of the primary endpoint [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:600-1400].

00-015-48dd8613.sentence: The median follow-up duration was 55 months [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:0-800].

00-016-69000482.sentence: In terms of safety, 15 percent of participants discontinued infusions because of adverse events [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:500-1300].

00-017-0c5bf638.sentence: Specifically, 16 percent of patients in the chelation group and 15 percent in the placebo group discontinued due to adverse events [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:500-1300].

00-018-a2b7aad2.sentence: In the chelation group, 16 percent discontinued due to adverse events [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:500-1300].

00-019-59b4f613.sentence: In the placebo group, 15 percent discontinued due to adverse events [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:500-1300].

00-020-b87a0ec9.sentence: Although the chelation group had a slightly higher discontinuation rate, the difference was only one percentage point [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:600-1400].

00-021-3ffd2f06.sentence: The population was restricted to post-MI patients with preserved renal function, as indicated by the serum creatinine cutoff [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:0-800].

00-022-9ec14a9b.sentence: The inclusion criteria specified a prior MI at least 6 weeks before enrollment [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:0-800].

01-004-8d024662.sentence: Mechanism: Zinc competes with these redox active metals for negative charges in lipid bilayer [#ev:zinc_oxidative_mechanism:7800-8600].

01-007-38c581c2.sentence: In a Mendelian randomization study, the causal relationship between iron status and coronary artery disease was investigated [#ev:iron_status_cvd_observational:0-800].

01-008-7a9b4beb.sentence: This study design leverages genetic variants as instrumental variables to estimate the unconfounded effect of an exposure on an outcome [#ev:iron_status_cvd_observational:0-800].

01-009-3623d162.sentence: The exposure of interest was iron status, and the outcome was coronary artery disease [#ev:iron_status_cvd_observational:0-800].

01-010-235f3da0.sentence: The analysis produced an odds ratio of 0.94 per standard deviation unit increase in iron status [#ev:iron_status_cvd_observational:600-1400].

01-011-9a6a61c3.sentence: Although the association was nominally significant with a P value of 0.039, the confidence interval’s inclusion of 1.00 suggests that a true null effect cannot be excluded [#ev:iron_status_cvd_observational:600-1400].

01-012-dbba1582.sentence: The primary mechanism identified was that zinc competes with redox active metals for negative charges in the lipid bilayer [#ev:zinc_oxidative_mechanism:7800-8600].

01-013-ed6b9985.sentence: Redox active metals, in contrast, also have affinity for these negative charges [#ev:zinc_oxidative_mechanism:8500-9300].

01-014-e1c22bc1.sentence: Although the evidence comes from an in vitro study, the findings provide a mechanistic basis for understanding how zinc might affect vascular biology [#ev:zinc_oxidative_mechanism:22400-23200].

01-015-120e6bde.sentence: In the context of metal-ion homeostasis, zinc's ability to compete with redox active metals may help mitigate oxidative stress at the membrane level [#ev:zinc_oxidative_mechanism:8500-9300].

01-016-8c68fd74.sentence: Whereas redox active metals can bind to negative charges, zinc competes for these sites [#ev:zinc_oxidative_mechanism:7800-8600].

03-000-117bc8e8.sentence: High‑dose zinc supplementation has been linked to nausea and an increased risk of infections [#ev:ev_713:3700-4500].

03-001-c5f53f2b.sentence: A double-blind, placebo-controlled randomized trial that enrolled 1708 patients aged 50 years or older with prior myocardial infarction and serum creatinine ≤2.0 mg/dL assigned participants to 40 infusions of an EDTA chelation solution or placebo [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:100-900]

03-002-8f59cb64.sentence: The trial had a serum creatinine entry criterion of ≤2.0 mg/dL [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:0-800]

03-003-7599dd39.sentence: The investigators concluded that the modest cardiovascular benefit observed is not sufficient to support routine use of chelation therapy for post‑myocardial infarction patients [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:2400-3200].

04-000-f394a6ec.sentence: A meta-analysis of 34 randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trials involving 2028 participants found that oral magnesium supplementation at a median dose of 368 mg/day for a median duration of 3 months significantly reduced systolic blood pressure (SBP) by 2.00 mmHg (95% CI 0.43–3.58) and diastolic blood pressure (DBP) by 1.78 mmHg (95% CI 0.73–2.82) compared with placebo, accompanied by a 0.05 mmol/L (95% CI 0.03–0.07) increase in serum magnesium [#ev:magnesium_supplementation_meta:200-1000].

04-001-fb17fd8a.sentence: The more recent 34-trial meta-analysis further demonstrated, using restricted cubic spline analysis, that a magnesium dose of 300 mg/day or a supplementation duration of 1 month was sufficient to elevate serum magnesium and reduce blood pressure [#ev:magnesium_supplementation_meta:400-1200].

04-002-16dc8215.sentence: The recommended dietary allowance (RDA) for magnesium in adults is 310–420 mg/day, while the tolerable upper intake level (UL) for supplemental magnesium is 350 mg/day [#ev:ev_018:1300-2100][#ev:nih_ods_mineral_supplement_safety:6100-6900].

04-003-4b94275c.sentence: A Cochrane Review of 12 trials in 545 hypertensive participants reported that magnesium supplementation at doses ranging from 243 to 973 mg/day reduced DBP by 2.2 mmHg [#ev:nih_ods_mineral_supplement_safety:23900-24700], while another meta-analysis of 22 studies with 1,173 participants found SBP reductions of 3–4 mmHg and DBP reductions of 2–3 mmHg [#ev:nih_ods_mineral_supplement_safety:23900-24700].

04-004-d47ccb87.sentence: In stratified analyses, a greater reduction in BP tended to be found in trials with high quality or low dropout rate (all P values for interaction <0.05), and serum Mg was negatively associated with diastolic BP but not systolic BP (all P <0.05) [#ev:magnesium_supplementation_meta:600-1400].

04-005-7a264bdd.sentence: Very high zinc intakes (142 mg/day) have been shown to interfere with magnesium absorption and disrupt magnesium balance [#ev:nih_ods_mineral_supplement_safety:13900-14700].

05-000-95e2a97f.sentence: Sensitivity analyses accounting for patient dropout and treatment adherence did not alter the results [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:2000-2800].

05-001-4bbca493.sentence: The investigators concluded that these results provide evidence to guide further research but are not sufficient to support routine use of chelation therapy for post-MI patients [#ev:tact_chelation_rct:2400-3200].

05-002-ec59e504.sentence: In one cohort, each quartile decrease in serum zinc was associated with a 10% increased risk of CVD mortality (p=0.038) [#ev:ev_730:8100-8900].

05-003-b9edff21.sentence: A review of coenzyme Q10 supplementation in heart failure noted improvements in ejection fraction (1.77% to 3.81%) and beneficial effects on mortality rates, but the data were inconsistent and optimal dosing remains unknown [#ev:ev_000:2200-3000].

05-004-dadf0a0e.sentence: Observational data on zinc status and long-term cardiovascular risk are mixed: a systematic review of fourteen prospective cohort studies including 91,708 participants for CVD outcomes reported that four out of five studies found no association between zinc intake and CVD events after multivariable adjustment, while three out of five studies observed a lower risk of CVD with higher serum zinc levels, particularly in vulnerable populations [#ev:ev_730:700-1500].
